content.section: Triple Shot is a tier 3 tank that can be selected upon reaching level 30 with "Twin", and at tier 4, can be upgraded into "Triplet", "Penta Shot" and "Spread Shot".

- Use the high recoil of this tank to your advantage, by positioning your tank well to both attack and retreat.
- Avoid battles with focused firing tanks.
- Keep a safe distance from tanks, however pressure them.

- In the early days of the game's release, Triple Shot used to upgrade from Quad Tank at level 45, and upgraded to Octo Tank at level 60.
- There used to be a bug in the game where by shooting and upgrading to the tank simultaneously would cause a destroyer bullet to appear.
